name: @gonext/blocks-transforms
description: Block transforms for GoNext — the 'change block type' affordance every modern editor has. Ships a TransformRegistry plus a curated set of first-party transforms (paragraph<->heading, list<->paragraphs, image->gallery, heading level shifts, code<->paragraph, columns<->group). Pure functions over Block / BlockTree — no React, no DOM. Apache-2.0.

scripts.build: echo '@gonext/blocks-transforms: source-only package, no build step'
